---
title: Self-hosting Your Email
author: GridFree
date: 2024-02-24
description: Running your own mail server is easier than you think
tags: ["#email", "#selfhosting"]
---
Running your own mail server is easier than you think. With modern tools like Mail-in-a-Box, you can be up and running in an afternoon.

The key challenge is not technical — it is deliverability. SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records are essential.
